explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Fifth Third Bank's governance practices include a focus on establishing governance foundations in 2024, developing an AI integration roadmap, and assessing AI capabilities. The bank also describes linking AI investment to ROI and references a proactive governance policy for understanding and guiding AI development. This policy includes the exploration of generative AI and an emphasis on talent acquisition for AI/ML.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: The interview with Fifth Third Bank's Director of IT Data and AI Governance provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars. The bank's focus on establishing governance foundations in 2024, developing an AI integration roadmap, assessing AI capabilities, and linking AI investment to ROI demonstrates a strategic and controlled approach to AI adoption. Furthermore, the exploration of generative AI and the emphasis on talent acquisition for AI/ML highlight a proactive governance policy for understanding and guiding AI development.
relevant_sources.title: Fifth Third Bank Director of IT Data and AI Governance Interview

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.path_to_improvement: Document data protection practices for AI systems, including vendor AI data handling.

transparency.findings: Sources describe documented transparency practices in 1 source(s). Additional documentation references related practices.
transparency.path_to_improvement: Publish detailed documentation (model cards, system specs) for AI systems deployed.

relevant_sources.summary: The interview with Fifth Third Bank's Director of IT Data and AI Governance provides evidence for the **governance** and **transparency** pillars. The bank's focus on establishing governance foundations in 2024, developing an AI integration roadmap, assessing AI capabilities, and linking AI investment to ROI demonstrates a strategic and controlled approach to AI adoption. Furthermore, the exploration of generative AI and the emphasis on talent acquisition for AI/ML highlight a proactive governance policy for understanding and guiding AI development.
relevant_sources.title: Fifth Third Bank Director of IT Data and AI Governance Interview

summary.overall_findings: Fifth Third Bancorp's published materials describe a focus on establishing governance foundations in 2024 and the development of an AI integration roadmap. Documented transparency practices are also described, with evidence found for 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars. Based on 10 publicly available sources, no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
